owner_operator_stated: Fox Valley Endodontic Specialists' own indexed page content names Cindy R. Rauschenberger, DDS, MS as the practice's endodontist, matching the record's legal entity 'CINDY R RAUSCHENBERGER DDS MS LTD.'
notes: Site's own listing (per Google-indexed page content -- direct WebFetch of fvendo.com repeatedly returned ECONNREFUSED in this environment, so this is based on search-result snippets actually seen, which is disclosed here) confirms 'Fox Valley Endodontic Specialists' at 1209 Dundee Ave, Elgin, IL 60120, phone (847) 742-9150 -- exact match to record. IMPORTANT for job-hunt purposes: search snippets indicate the practice STOPPED SEEING PATIENTS after March 10, 2023 -- Dr. Rauschenberger left for a two-year position at Tuba City Regional Healthcare Center (AZ, serving Navajo/Hopi reservations) and Dr. Shariff took a family leave; the site states they hope to recruit a new endodontist for the location. Effectively dormant/closed as of last evidence -- do not treat as an active roster for outreach without calling to confirm current status. Vendor hint 'Smilesofelgin.Com' for this record was WRONG -- that domain belongs to a different, unconfirmed Elgin practice (see location 7da82fefa32e46ad below).

Vendor hint domain freedomdentalinelgin.com does NOT resolve (DNS NXDOMAIN, confirmed via direct lookup). An alternate domain freedomdental.net (surfaced independently in search) also fails to resolve/connect (curl: exit 000 on http and https). The practice's Facebook page (facebook.com/FreedomDentalLTD) exists but returned no retrievable address/phone/doctor/hiring content when fetched (likely login-gated in this environment), so it cannot satisfy the address/phone corroboration rule. Third-party directories (Yelp, CareCredit, Vitadox) consistently list 1185 Dundee Ave Ste A1, Elgin IL 60120 and phone (847) 488-9145 matching the record, and name doctors Asma Shareef DDS, Shehbaz Shareef DMD, Elizabeth Escarria DMD -- but per the corroboration kill rule these are vendor/directory sources, not the practice's own website, so they are deliberately NOT used to populate doctors[] or owner_operator_stated. Do not confuse with the unrelated national chain 'Freedom Dental Health' (careers.freedomdentalhealth.com), which surfaced in search but has no connection to this Elgin practice. No ownership-conflict signal found (no different entity claims this address/phone) -- classified no_usable_website rather than ownership_conflict.

owner_operator_stated: Record's phone (847) 695-1300 is now registered to Fox Valley Dental Care, LLC at 74 N Alfred Ave, Elgin, IL 60123 (fvdc.com) -- a different address AND a different named entity than 'Smiles of Elgin P.C.' A same-named candidate, 'Smiles of Elgin Dental Care' (smilesofelgin.com), is associated with the record's street (860 Summit St) only in third-party directories; the practice's own contact-us page lists a different phone ((847) 695-3368) and an inconsistent address (1209 Dundee Ave), so it cannot be confirmed as the same entity under the corroboration rule.
notes: Vendor hint 'Aapd.Org' is not a practice website at all (it is the American Academy of Pediatric Dentistry's association site) and was disregarded. Per the successor-detection protocol, searched the record's exact phone '(847) 695-1300' in quotes: it now belongs to Fox Valley Dental Care, LLC, 74 N Alfred Ave, Elgin IL 60123, a completely unrelated practice/address (confirmed via NPI lookup aggregator + WebSearch + fvdc.com contact info, all showing 847-695-1300). Separately, at the record's own address (860 Summit St), multiple unrelated practices are documented: Elgin Dental Center (Ste 111, phone (847) 741-8177, per Yelp) and Smiles of Elgin Dental Care (phone (847) 695-3368, smilesofelgin.com). Neither matches the record's phone. Smiles of Elgin Dental Care's own contact-us page even lists 1209 Dundee Ave as its address (not 860 Summit St), adding further inconsistency and suggesting a possible site template error or an additional relocation. Could not corroborate any single website to the named entity 'SMILES OF ELGIN P.C' by address+phone per the kill rule -- classified ownership_conflict because the record's phone number demonstrably belongs to a different, verified practice.
